reasoning: A wins on the central test: its five versions occupy genuinely separate conceptual spaces (metabolic creditor, two-body pivot negotiation, grown mycelial organism, standing exo-cradle sleep, and phase-change gel that archives every past sitter), and the Inherited Posture idea (sitting as inheritance/haunting of the dead) is a surprise no other response reaches, all developed with concrete mechanism. B is nearly as well-crafted but several entries cluster on common reinvention tropes that overlap A's moves (its Debt, Loam, and Quorum mirror A's Debt, Chair That Eats, and Negotiation Seat); its Tide and Understudy are its only truly distinct escapes. C has a respectable spread and a clean conceptual exit in the Absence Chair, but its versions are thin one-line sketches with little developed mechanism, and the Temporary Skeleton plus metabolic chair overlap each other, dragging down craft and generativity.
